title: elaeagnus glabra subsp. tenuiflora
intro: Elaeagnus glabra subsp. tenuiflora is a plant species that belongs to the Elaeagnaceae family, also known as silverberry or wolfberry, native to China and other parts of Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, which are attributed to its rich content of flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Elaeagnus glabra subsp. tenuiflora are said to include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as possessing immunomodulatory and anticancer properties. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or extract, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments, such as fever, cough, and digestive issues.
